regime_fall.current_status: Iran faces converging existential pressures: a collapsing April 23 ceasefire deadline with US blockade of 23+ vessels, comprehensive Israeli strikes on June 14-15 eliminating IRGC leadership and energy infrastructure, and cascading internal instability marked by mandatory Basij deployment, succession upheaval, and economic freefall amid threatened 15 million barrel production halts.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Israeli airstrikes on June 14-15 killed IRGC Intelligence Chief Mohammad Kazemi and deputies while destroying critical energy infrastructure including Shahran oil depot, regime ministries, and airbases, while simultaneously degrading coercive security apparatus capacity and forcing emergency Basij nationwide deployment to suppress dissent.
